name: Spicy Stewed Cauliflower & Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 Dry red chili, seeded and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion and cook until it turns brown, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in potatoes and cook until they begin to brown. Cook frequently.
4. Add cayenne, lemon juice, salt, and turmeric. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
5. Add cauliflower and chilies, stirring well.
6. Add about 1/4 cup of water. Continue cooking until the vegetables are tender, adding more water if necessary.
Adapted from Ismail Merchant, "Indian Cuisine"
